title: Systems and methods for use in facilitating purchases
abstract: Systems and methods are provided for facilitating purchase transactions for travel. One exemplary system comprises a memory including a user profile associated with a secondary user and a payment account, and a processor in communication with the memory. The processor is configured to access the user profile in the memory, and display an available destination for travel based on the user profile. The processor is also configured, in response to selection of the available destination, to display a travel option to the secondary for travel to the available destination, and in response to selection of the travel option, to provide a credential associated with the payment account, thereby permitting a point-of-sale computing device associated with a merchant of the selected travel option to capture the credential and initiate a purchase transaction for the selected travel option.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A system for facilitating purchase transactions for travel by a secondary user via funds provided to the secondary user by a primary user, the system comprising: a memory including a user profile associated with the secondary user and with a payment account; and a processor in communication with the memory and configured to: access the user profile, associated with the secondary user, in the memory; display an available destination for travel, based on the accessed user profile; in response to a selection of the available destination, display a travel option to the secondary user, the travel option including travel for the secondary user to the available destination; and in response to a selection of the travel option, provide a credential associated with the payment account, thereby permitting a point of sale (POS) computing device associated with a merchant of the selected travel option to capture the credential and initiate a purchase transaction for the selected travel option, funded by the payment account for the secondary user, to allow the secondary to travel to the available destination. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the processor is configured to display the available destination for travel at a communication device associated with the secondary user. 3. The system of claim 2, wherein the user profile includes multiple available destinations for travel, the multiple available destinations including the selected available destination; and wherein the processor is further configured, in connection with displaying the available destination for travel, to display the multiple available destinations for travel to the secondary user at the communication device associated with the secondary user. 4. The system of claim 1, wherein the processor is configured, in order to provide a credential associated with the payment account, to cause a computer- readable indicia associated with the credential to be displayed at a communication device associated with the secondary user. 5. The system of claim 4, wherein the processor is further configured to: cause a payment account transaction to be initiated for a pass associated with the selected travel option; and display the pass at the communication device associated with the secondary user. 6. The system of claim 1, further comprising a platform computing device including the processor; wherein the platform computing device is configured to: solicit, from the primary user, at least one fund transfer parameter to facilitate a transfer of funds to the payment account associated with the secondary user; and cause the transfer of funds, consistent with the at least one fund transfer parameter, to the payment account associated with the secondary user, whereby the primary user is permitted to provide the funds for the purchase of the selected travel option by the secondary user. 7. The system of claim 1, further comprising a communication device including the processor, the communication device associated with the secondary 8. The system of claim 7, further comprising a platform computing device in communication with the communication device; wherein the platform computing device is configured to: solicit, from the primary user, at least one fund transfer parameter to facilitate a transfer of funds to the payment account associated with the secondary user; and cause the transfer of funds, consistent with the at least one fund transfer parameter, to the payment account associated with the secondary user, 

 whereby the primary user is permitted to provide the funds for the purchase of the selected travel option by the secondary user. 9. The system of claim 8, further comprising a communication device associated with the primary user and in communication with the platform computing device; wherein the communication device associated with the primary user is configured to provide the at least one fund transfer parameter to the platform computing device. 10. The system of claim 7, further comprising a platform computing device including the memory; wherein the platform computing device is configured to: access the user profile in the memory; and provide an event log to a communication device associated with the primary user based on the accessed user profile, the event log including a listing of multiple user events associated with travel of the secondary user. 11. The system of claim 10, wherein the event log includes one or more of a specific travel time for the travel option, a specific travel route for the travel option, and a cost associated with the travel option. 12. A non-transitory computer-readable storage media including executable instructions for facilitating purchase of transit that, when executed by at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to: access a profile associated with a primary user, the profile including a payment account and an identification of a secondary user; display an event log included in the profile, the event log including at least one transit purchase event associated with the secondary user; solicit at least one fund transfer parameter for a fund transfer to an account associated with the secondary user; and cause a fund transfer to the account, funded by the payment account and consistent with the at least one fund transfer parameter, whereby the primary user is permitted to provide funds for the purchase of transit by the secondary user. 13. The method of claim 12, wherein the profile incudes identification of multiple secondary users, including the secondary user; and wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause the at least one processor, in response to a selection by the primary user to transfer funds to the secondary user, to: display each of the multiple secondary users to the primary user, at a presentation unit associated with the at least one processor; and receive a selection of the secondary user, prior to soliciting the at least one fund transfer parameter. 14. The method of claim 13, wherein the at least one fund transfer parameter includes a limitation on a type of transaction by the secondary user; and wherein the limitation is related to transit. 15. The method of claim 12, wherein the profile incudes identification of multiple secondary users, including the secondary user; wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause the at least one processor to: display each of the multiple secondary users associated with the profile to the primary user; and receive a selection of the secondary user; and wherein the payment account included in the profile is associated with the secondary user. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause the at least one processor to send a notification of the fund transfer to the secondary user upon verification of the fund transfer. 17. A non-transitory computer-readable storage media including executable instructions for facilitating a purchase that, when executed by at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to: 

 access a profile of a secondary user, the profile including at least one available product and/or merchant and at least one purchase option registered by a primary user; display the at least one available product and/or merchant to the secondary user; receive a selection of the at least one available product and/or merchant from the secondary user; in response to the selection of the at least one available product and/or merchant, by the secondary user, display the at least one purchase option to the secondary user for the selected at least one available product and/or merchant, based on the profile of the secondary user; and in response to a selection of the at least one purchase option, provide a credential associated with a payment account of the secondary user and funded by the primary user, thereby permitting a point of sale (POS) computing device associated with a merchant for the selected at least one purchase option to capture the credential and initiate a purchase transaction for the selected purchase option funded by the payment account of the secondary user. 18. The non-transitory computer-readable storage media of claim 17, wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, cause the at least one processor, in order to provide the credential, to display a computer-readable indicia representative of the credential; and wherein the computer-readable indicia includes one of a barcode and a QR code. 19. The non-transitory computer-readable storage media of claim 17, wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause the at least one processor to transmit a request for funds to the primary user associated with the secondary user, whereby the payment account of the secondary user is funded by the primary user. 20. The non-transitory computer-readable storage media of claim 17, wherein the at least one available product and/or merchant includes an available destination for travel, and wherein the at least one purchase option includes a travel 

 option associated with the available destination and provided by a travel merchant; and wherein the executable instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause the at least one processor to: cause a payment account transaction to be initiated for a pass from the travel merchant; and display the purchased pass at a presentation unit associated with the at least one processor, whereby the pass is permitted to be viewed and/or captured by the travel merchant to permit the secondary user to travel to the at least one available destination.
